pi_items.source: Verified from task description and export_result.sh which validates this destination path.
Verified from setup_task.sh (deploys this JAR) and export_result.sh (checks for its presence inside the ZIP).
Verified from task description and verifier.py which strictly checks max_size == 500.
Verified from environment script scripts/setup_artifactory.sh where ADMIN_USER is hardcoded.
Verified from environment script scripts/setup_artifactory.sh where ADMIN_PASS is hardcoded.

privileged_info_summary: The environment runs JFrog Artifactory with an administrator account (admin:password). A synthetic version of commons-io-2.15.1.jar is pre-deployed into the example-repo-local repository under the path org/apache/commons/commons-io/2.15.1. The system's 'Max Folder Download Size' must be configured to exactly 500 MB. A valid ZIP archive containing the JAR file must be downloaded to the specific path /home/ga/Desktop/commons-io-package.zip.
